_note: SoD recipes kept as trainer-taught instead of inheriting a non-trainer source from the DEFAULT/TBC bucket. Listing a spell here suppresses its cross-bucket audit finding and prevents reconcile from overriding it. Categories: (1) 11479 Transmute: Iron to Gold - a confirmed Classic-Era vs TBC acquisition difference, re-verified 2026-06-27; the keep-as-SoD-trainer decision stands (SoD/Era listview: trainer, trainingCost 2500; TBC bucket: vendor, plan item 9304, cost 8000c). (2) 17632 Alchemist's Stone - its TBC source is The Sha'tar reputation, a TBC-only faction absent from SoD/Era, so the recipe item carries no faction requirement in the SoD data and the true SoD source cannot be corroborated. (3) The remaining 23 are high-level recipes absent from the SoD profession listview (no SoD difficulty data, so they are not generated into the shipped SoD recipe set); their TBC-bucket source cannot be verified for SoD, so they are kept as trainer rather than asserting an unverified vendor/drop/quest source. Vendor patterns: 2671, 7636, 12062, 12063, 12068, 12083, 12087, 12090 (Stormcloth/Woolen) and 16960, 16965, 16967, 16980, 16986, 16987 (Dark Iron Smithing specialty weapon plans - Rune Edge/Blood Talon/Darkspear require the Dark Iron specialty to craft; the TBC bucket types all six as VENDOR plan items 12816/12817/12818/12826/12831/12832, not reputation). Drops: 2336, 6619, 8778, 10550, 17579, 19106. Quest rewards: 8366, 8368, 9942.
